jobs.title: Senior Software Engineer, Agent Platform
jobs.descriptionPlain: Build LLM-powered agent systems at Contoso. Python, FastAPI, vector databases (pgvector, Qdrant), Postgres, Redis. You will design tool-use loops, self-critique pipelines, and orchestration graphs. Familiarity with LangGraph or CrewAI is a strong plus.

jobs.title: Engineering Manager, Backend
jobs.descriptionPlain: Manage a team of 6 backend engineers. Strong Python background, distributed systems, mentoring, on-call leadership. Experience with agent systems a plus.
